metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore advanced networking, database administration, IT project management, and systems analysis. This course prepares students for IT infrastructure careers through practical experience with network design, server management, and enterprise systems.
metadata.general_description: Advanced networking, database administration, IT project management, and systems analysis.

big_ideas.statement: Information systems integrate hardware, software, networks, and people to support organizational operations
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern organizations depend on reliable, secure, scalable information systems to enable business processes and decision-making.

big_ideas.statement: Networking infrastructure connects devices and enables secure data communication across organizations
big_ideas.elaboration: Network design, management, and security are critical to ensuring reliable, fast, and protected information flow.

big_ideas.statement: Database systems organize, protect, and enable efficient access to organizational data
big_ideas.elaboration: Database administration ensures data integrity, availability, security, and performance for organizational applications.

big_ideas.statement: IT professionals apply technical knowledge, communication, and problem-solving to support organizational technology needs
big_ideas.elaboration: Effective IT management requires understanding technology, business requirements, user needs, and project management.

competencies.raw: Design network architectures and infrastructure solutions
i_can_statements: I can assess organizational network requirements
I can design network topologies and protocols
I can plan security and disaster recovery
I can design scalable and reliable systems

competencies.raw: Design database solutions to support organizational needs
i_can_statements: I can analyze data requirements and design schemas
I can design for performance and reliability
I can implement security and access controls
I can plan backup and recovery procedures

competencies.raw: Design IT solutions addressing organizational problems
i_can_statements: I can conduct systems analysis and requirements assessment
I can propose technology solutions
I can plan implementation and transition
I can design support and maintenance plans

competencies.raw: Design IT projects and implementation plans
i_can_statements: I can plan project scope and objectives
I can estimate resources and timelines
I can identify risks and mitigation strategies
I can develop communication and change management plans

competencies.raw: Apply networking knowledge to configure and manage systems
i_can_statements: I can configure routers, switches, and firewalls
I can implement network security protocols
I can troubleshoot network connectivity problems
I can monitor network performance and optimize
I can install and configure database systems
I can manage users, privileges, and security
I can monitor performance and optimize queries
I can implement backup and recovery procedures

competencies.raw: Apply IT support and troubleshooting skills
i_can_statements: I can diagnose and resolve hardware issues
I can install and configure software
I can support end users and provide training
I can document problems and solutions

competencies.raw: Apply project management and communication skills
i_can_statements: I can manage IT projects effectively
I can communicate with technical and non-technical stakeholders
I can document systems and processes
I can track progress and manage changes

competencies.raw: Use networking hardware and configuration tools
i_can_statements: I can operate networking equipment
I can use network configuration and diagnostic tools
I can interpret network protocols and packet analysis
I can implement security appliances

competencies.raw: Use database management systems and tools
i_can_statements: I can use DBMS administration tools
I can write SQL for administration and reporting
I can use monitoring and optimization tools
I can implement security and encryption

competencies.raw: Use systems management and IT operations tools
i_can_statements: I can use remote access and support tools
I can use asset and change management systems
I can implement virtualization and cloud technologies
I can use monitoring and alerting systems

competencies.raw: Use project and documentation management tools
i_can_statements: I can use project management software
I can create system documentation
I can use collaboration and communication platforms
I can maintain ticketing and incident systems
